subject_id.Description: Subject ID from BIDS naming (e.g., sub-01)

session_id.Description: Session ID if multi-session dataset, else 'n/a'

output_num.Description: Total number of output files for this subject/session in the derivative

output_size.Description: Total size of all output files for this subject/session

nifti_num.Description: Number of NIfTI files (.nii, .nii.gz) for this subject/session

nifti_size.Description: Total size of NIfTI files for this subject/session

html_num.Description: Number of HTML report files for this subject/session
